summary: Successfully tested updated AfriWonder audit dashboard - all backend API changes and frontend display updates are working correctly. Score updated from 58 to 72, production readiness to 65%, mobile screens to 112, and implementations_done array has 8 items as expected.

design_issues.issue: Static text still mentions '108 ecrans' instead of updated '112 ecrans'

passed_tests: Backend API /api/audit returns implementations_done array with 8 items
Frontend dashboard shows updated Score Global 72/100
Frontend dashboard shows updated Production Readiness 65%
Frontend dashboard shows updated Ecrans Mobile 112
All 11 navigation sections work correctly (overview, architecture, features, live, offline, revenue, security, performance, testing, admin, priority)
Revenue section shows all 10 revenue sources with expansion functionality
Priority section shows P0/P1/P2 action items (3 priority groups)
Features section shows 12 feature items with working expansion/collapse functionality
Score cards display with correct data-testid attributes for testing
Frontend-backend integration working perfectly with updated data
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Update static text in executive summary to reflect '112 ecrans' instead of '108 ecrans' for consistency
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (all endpoints working with updated data), Frontend: 99% (one minor text inconsistency)
